body_template: Black obsidian fields glint across the high plateau. Álftavatn lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
The green valley opens to a still lake. Hvanngil waits {miles_to_next} on.
A sheltered glen between the ridges. From here the black sands begin — {miles_to_next} to Emstrur.
Across the dark desert to the canyon huts. Þórsmörk's birch woods rise {miles_to_next} beyond.
{character} reaches the birch woods between the glaciers — {total_miles} walked from Landmannalaugar.
